payload.answer: This appears to be the same message delivered three times. I can offer repair choices only and will not save or merge anything here.
repair_options: Treat the repeated deliveries as one idempotent request and do not create duplicate entries.
If this is new information, offer to add a separate memory that Sam from Goldman mentioned he likes Bill Evans.
If a similar memory already exists, keep the existing memory unchanged and do not add a duplicate.
Ask the user to clarify whether “Sam from Goldman” refers to an existing Sam contact before any durable update.
